data.body:
[5/30 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]
Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 5/30 (Tue).

Maintenance Period: 5/30 (Tue) 2:00 – 7:00 AM (UTC)
Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2138285

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.
